name: Baked Fish with Almond Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 5 1/2 lb Whole bass or red snapper (cleaned and washed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Saute onion in 2 tablespoons butter until soft.
3. Add bread crumbs, celery, green onion, almonds, eggs, parsley, and tarragon; mix well.
4. Stuff the cavity of fish with mixture and sew shut.
5. Melt 8 tablespoons butter; line a large shallow baking dish with foil. Pour a little melted butter over the bottom.
6. Place fish on the foil and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, basting frequently with remaining melted butter, or until fish flakes easily with a fork. Do not overcook.
